assessment_items.question_content:
The square below represents one whole.

[[☃ image 1]]

**What percent is represented by the shaded area?**

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] $\%$
hints: The ratio of shaded pieces to total pieces is $\blueE7:10$.

Percent means per hundred.  

So, we need an equivalent ratio that will tell us how many pieces would be shaded out of $100$ total pieces.

|||
-|-|-|-
Shaded | ${7}$ | $\stackrel{\times 10}\rightarrow$ | ${70}$
Parts per whole | $10$ | $\stackrel{\times 10}\rightarrow$  | $100$

[[☃ image 1]]

We can also divide the ten pieces into a hundred and see that $\blueE{7}:10$ is equivalent to $\blueE{70}:100$.

[[☃ image 2]]
$\blueE{70}:100= \blueE{70}$ per hundred $=\blueE{70}\%$
$\blueE{70}\%$ is represented by the shaded area.

options.alt: A fraction model representing 1 whole partitioned into 10 equal parts.  7 parts are shaded.
